name: frootai-mcp
description: AI architecture knowledge engine — 16 tools, 18 modules, 200+ terms. The open glue for infrastructure, platform, and application teams building AI solutions on Azure.
longDescription: FrootAI MCP Server provides curated AI architecture knowledge as callable agent tools. Instead of burning tokens searching the internet, agents call FrootAI to get precise definitions, architecture patterns, model comparisons, cost estimates, and guided build→review→tune workflows. Covers the full AI stack: tokens → models → RAG → agents → production operations.

static.name: list_modules
static.description: Browse all 18 FROOT knowledge modules organized by layer (Foundations → Reasoning → Orchestration → Operations → Transformation)

static.name: get_module
static.description: Read any knowledge module content by ID (F1–F4, R1–R3, O1–O3, O4–O6, T1–T3)

static.name: lookup_term
static.description: Look up any of 200+ AI/ML terms with precise definitions, context, and related terms

static.name: search_knowledge
static.description: Full-text search across all 18 modules — returns ranked results with excerpts

static.name: get_architecture_pattern
static.description: 7 pre-built architecture decision guides: RAG, agents, model selection, infra, cost, security, evaluation

static.name: get_froot_overview
static.description: Complete FROOT framework summary — all layers, modules, and how they connect

live.name: fetch_azure_docs
live.description: Search Microsoft Learn for Azure service documentation — returns relevant excerpts with links

live.name: fetch_external_mcp
live.description: Find MCP servers from public registries — discover tools your agent can add

live.name: list_community_plays
live.description: List 20 solution plays from FrootAI GitHub — each with description, status, and link

live.name: get_github_agentic_os
live.description: .github Agentic OS guide — 7 primitives, 4 layers, file structure for AI-first repos

agent_chain.name: agent_build
agent_chain.description: Builder agent guidance — scaffolding, DevKit generation, and handoff to reviewer

agent_chain.name: agent_review
agent_chain.description: Reviewer agent — security, cost, compliance, and architecture validation checks

agent_chain.name: agent_tune
agent_chain.description: Tuner agent — production readiness: temperature, guardrails, evaluation, monitoring

ai_ecosystem.name: get_model_catalog
ai_ecosystem.description: Azure AI model catalog — GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, o1, o3, DeepSeek, Phi, Llama with pricing and capabilities

ai_ecosystem.name: get_azure_pricing
ai_ecosystem.description: Monthly cost estimates for AI solution architectures — compute, storage, AI services, networking

ai_ecosystem.name: compare_models
ai_ecosystem.description: Side-by-side model comparison for a specific use case — latency, cost, quality, context window

metrics.tokenEfficiency: 90% reduction vs internet search — curated knowledge, no noise
metrics.responseLatency: <100ms for static tools, <2s for live tools
